raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Senator Dave Cortese's SB 550 authorizes the incorporation of San Jose State University as the first public law school in the California State University system.",
    "California is facing a crisis in affordable legal education.",
    "The average law school debt now exceeds $130,000.",
    "67% of young lawyers report financial stress, which deters many from pursuing legal careers in public service.",
    "There is a geographic disparity in public legal education access in California.",
    "Over 65% of the population in Santa Clara County identifies as Asian or Latino, both of which remain severely underrepresented among licensed attorneys statewide.",
    "Many prospective lawyers are discouraged from entering public service legal jobs due to comparatively low compensation.",
    "The creation of a law school at San Jose State University will help alleviate the financial burden of legal education by offering an affordable, quality legal education."
  ]
}
```
